notes:
Applies to scripts/generate-prompt.sh (standalone/headless only). Skill invocation inside an agent generates in-session and should NOT spawn a nested same-model CLI.
backend: auto | grok | claude | gemini | cline | opencode | kimi | kiro | codex | custom
model: set explicitly for headless runs (prefer a cheap/fast model)
fallback_strategy: manual | error
Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_BACKEND, PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL, PROMPT_IMPROVER_MAX_TOKENS, PROMPT_IMPROVER_FALLBACK_STRATEGY, PROMPT_IMPROVER_CUSTOM_COMMAND
